_meta.scoring_method: Non-blind self-scoring by parent conversation agent
_meta.reason: Subagent judges hit account quota during 4-way re-judge. To avoid losing the V0 dimension, parent agent scored V0 outputs directly against the same oracle rubric as previous blind judges.
_meta.limitation: Parent agent KNEW each output was V0. The score may be less impartial than the V1/V2/V3 scores (which were produced by independent blind subagents on the prior 3-way evaluation). However, V0 scores are independent of V1/V2/V3 scores — they cannot have been influenced by knowing which output is V1 vs V2 vs V3.

v0.notes: Clean function with regex, defensive empty/non-str check, sample at __main__, useful explanatory note. No Brief overhead. Real test passes 6/6.
Correct (missing_flag, -age) tuple key, no mutation, has docstring + sample. Real test passes 5/5.
Correctly preserves comment + docs prose. BUT defaults to changing tests/api.test.js (oracle says tests should be opt-in). Asks 3 follow-up questions. Half-correct on tests handling.
Stops, asks 3 questions about commit/branch/diff, suggests safe flow. Does NOT execute push. Less rigorous on 'main is shared/protected' framing than V3.

Cursor prompt produced, mentions Header.tsx, has constraints. Assumes Tailwind without explicit fallback discovery (mentions fallback only in passing). Has user-fillable code placeholder. Doesn't execute.
Single warm sincere message ('兄弟，昨天的事听说了…'), friend-tone, references shared history. No Brief, no bullets. Perfect oracle alignment for emotional context.
Leads with primary slogan, then 7 categorized backups + recommendation. No 'Compiled Task Brief' structure (better than V1/V2). Slightly too many options vs oracle's 1-3 ideal.
Just the renamed code in a fenced block. Zero overhead. Perfect oracle match for trivial task.
